top_signals.title: ECB’s Nagel Says He’s Keeping Options Open for Next Two Meetings
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank Governing Council member Joachim Nagel said he’s keeping an open mind on what action is needed at the next two interest-rate meetings, with uncertainly remaining over the situation in the Middle East and its effect on inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Iran says it is selling oil at 20% premium as end of U.S. blockade sees 40 million barrels exported
top_signals.summary: The ceasefire prompted a surge in crude shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, where traffic had largely ground to a halt during the conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UAE's exit from OPEC+ reduced the group's share of crude oil production and capacity
top_signals.summary: On April 28, 2026, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) announced that it was leaving OPEC, effective on May 1. OPEC was formed in 1960 by Iraq, Iran, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, and Venezuela, with the stated objective to "coordinate and unify petroleum policies among Member Countries." OPEC is best known for its effect on global crude oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Record chip rally adds $2 trillion in combined value to Micron, Intel and AMD in second quarter
top_signals.summary: Wall Street poured into chipmakers not named Nvidia in the second quarter, as the artificial intelligence boom expanded to include more suppliers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Alphabet’s $2 Trillion Gain Turns ‘Rock Star’ Into Question Mark
top_signals.summary: Alphabet Inc. has had a remarkable 12 months by just about any measure you can imagine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Palo Alto, CrowdStrike both have best quarter ever as AI threats bolster cyber demand
top_signals.summary: The cybersecurity leaders are leaning into identity security, a critical cyber segment, as AI agents outnumber humans
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Traditional Japanese mechanical dolls showcased in London
top_signals.summary: Karakuri ningyo, or wooden automata powered without electricity, became popular in Japan during the Edo Period
